candidate_definitions.text: An example agent demonstrating streaming, tool use, and interactivity from your terminal. This agent builder can help you to build your own agents and tools.
<div align="center">
This MCP server provides documentation about Strands Agents to your GenAI tools, so you can use your favorite AI coding assistant to vibe-code Strands Agents.
<div align="center">
Agent samples built using the Strands Agents SDK.
<div align="center">
✨ Light and Fast AI Assistant. Support: Web | iOS | MacOS | Android |  Linux | Windows
<div align="center">
A model-driven approach to building AI agents in just a few lines of code.
<div align="center">
A set of tools that gives agents powerful capabilities.
<div align="center">
Documentation for the Strands Agents SDK. A model-driven approach to building AI agents in just a few lines of code.
<div align="center">
Download models from the Ollama library, without Ollama
Downloads models from the [Ollama](https://ollama.com/library) library.

Production-grade platform for building agentic IM bots - 生产级多平台智能机器人开发平台. 提供 Agent、知识库编排、插件系统 / Bots for Discord / Slack / LINE / Telegram / WeChat(企业微信, 企微智能机器人, 公众号) / 飞书 / 钉钉 / QQ / Satori e.g. Integrated with ChatGPT(GPT), DeepSeek, Dify, n8n, Langflow, Coze, Claude, Gemini, MiniMax, Ollama, SiliconFlow, Moonshot, GLM, clawdbot / openclaw

18 AI personas deliberate your hardest decisions across multiple LLM providers. Aristotle, Feynman, Kahneman, Torvalds & more — structured multi-round deliberation with genuine model diversity. One command: /council
The TypeScript library for building AI applications.
> ### The TypeScript library for building AI applications.
GUI for ChatGPT API and many LLMs. Supports agents, file-based QA, GPT finetuning and query with web search. All with a neat UI.
<div align="right">
RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs
<div align="center">
Starter examples for using Next.js and the Vercel AI SDK with Ollama and ModelFusion.

This starter example shows how to use [Next.js](https://nextjs.org/), the [Vercel AI SDK](https://sdk.vercel.ai/docs), [Ollama](https://ollama.ai/) and [ModelFusion](https://modelfusion.dev) to create a ChatGPT-like AI-powered streaming chat bot.

Langchain-Chatchat（原Langchain-ChatGLM）基于 Langchain 与 ChatGLM, Qwen 与 Llama 等语言模型的 RAG 与 Agent 应用 | Langchain-Chatchat (formerly langchain-ChatGLM), local knowledge based LLM (like ChatGLM, Qwen and Llama) RAG and Agent app with langchain
![](docs/img/logo-long-chatchat-trans-v2.png)
Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
Compute Node of Dria Knowledge Network.
Agents-flex is A Lightweight Java AI Application Development Framework.
Agents-flex is A Lightweight Java AI Application Development Framework.
Enchanted is iOS and macOS app for chatting with private self hosted language models such as Llama2, Mistral or Vicuna using Ollama.
[](https://apps.apple.com/gb/app/enchanted-llm/id6474268307)
User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)
![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/open-webui/open-webui?style=social)

LangChain4j is an idiomatic, open-source Java library for building LLM-powered applications on the JVM. It offers a unified API over popular LLM providers and vector stores, and makes implementing tool calling (including MCP support), agents and RAG easy. It integrates seamlessly with enterprise Java frameworks like Quarkus and Spring Boot.

[![Build Status](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/langchain4j/langchain4j/main.yaml?branch=main&style=for-the-badge&label=CI%20BUILD&logo=github)](https://github.com/langchain4j/langchain4j/actions/workflows/main.yaml)
The easiest way to use Ollama in .NET
[![nuget version](https://img.shields.io/nuget/v/OllamaSharp)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/OllamaSharp)
A lightning-fast, cross-platform AI Assistant App built with React Native.
> 🚀 Your Personal AI Workspace — Chat, Create Apps, and More

DevoxxGenie is a plugin for IntelliJ IDEA that uses local LLM's (Ollama, LMStudio, GPT4All, Jan and Llama.cpp) and Cloud based LLMs to help review, test, explain your project code. Latest version now also supports Spec Driven Development with CLI Runners.
Powerful AI Client
☸️ Easy, advanced inference platform for large language models on Kubernetes. 🌟 Star to support our work!

Python SDK for AI agent monitoring, LLM cost tracking, benchmarking, and more. Integrates with most LLMs and agent frameworks including CrewAI, Agno, OpenAI Agents SDK, Langchain, Autogen, AG2, and CamelAI
<div align="center">
Sample Spring AI Application with several use cases
[![CircleCI](https://circleci.com/gh/piomin/spring-ai-showcase.svg?style=svg)](https://circleci.com/gh/piomin/spring-ai-showcase)
A single-file tkinter-based Ollama GUI project with no external dependencies.
![GitHub License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/chyok/ollama-gui)
Get started with LLMs.
Get started with LLMs.
Maid is a free and open source application for interfacing with llama.cpp models locally, and with Anthropic, DeepSeek, Ollama, Mistral and OpenAI models remotely.
<div align="center" id = "top">

LLM Agent Framework in ComfyUI includes MCP sever, Omost,GPT-sovits, ChatTTS,GOT-OCR2.0, and FLUX prompt nodes,access to Feishu,discord,and adapts to all llms with similar openai / aisuite interfaces, such as o1,ollama, gemini, grok, qwen, GLM, deepseek, kimi,doubao. Adapted to local llms, vlm, gguf such as llama-3.3 Janus-Pro, Linkage graphRAG
![图片](img/封面.png)

One beautiful Ruby API for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Bedrock, Azure, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Ollama, VertexAI, Perplexity, Mistral, xAI, GPUStack & OpenAI compatible APIs. Agents, Chat, Vision, Audio, PDF, Images, Embeddings, Tools, Streaming & Rails integration.
<div align="center">
🤖 TUI for LLMs
<div align="center">
KaiROS AI— Intelligence, Precisely When It Matters.
Chat with multiple PDFs locally
![alt text](assets/demo.png)
A multi-platform desktop application to evaluate and compare LLM models, written in Rust and React.

This project automates the process of selecting the best models, prompts, or inference parameters for a given use-case, allowing you to iterate over their combinations and to visually inspect the results.
A terminal utility for intelligent shell command generation
On-premises conversational RAG with configurable containers
A minimal LLM chat app that runs entirely in your browser
A minimal LLM chat app that runs _entirely_ in your browser.
the terminal client for LLMs

Hexabot v3 is an AI automation platform, combining workflows, actions, agents, and conversational channels in one runtime.

FROM node:18-alpine AS base FROM base AS deps RUN apk add --no-cache libc6-compat WORKDIR /app COPY package.json yarn.lock ./ RUN yarn config set registry 'https://registry.npmmirror.com/' RUN yarn install FROM base AS builder RUN apk update && apk add --no-cache git ENV OPENAI_…
